query:
INSERT INTO agent_traces (
                id, finding_id, task_kind, runtime_name, model, prompt_version,
                conversation_jsonl_path, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_usd_micros,
                cache_hits, cache_misses, duration_ms, started_at, finished_at,
                verifier_blob
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
